<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band06_chunk002.pdf#page=16 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band06 p80 -->

<!-- header: STADT FREISING -->

<!-- header: CTADT FREISING -->


[[File:Band06_chunk002_p016_img001.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p016_img002.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p016_img003.jpg|thumb|16 Ewige Glückseligkeit]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p016_img004.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p016_img005.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p016_img006.jpg|thumb|Gebet]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p016_img007.jpg|thumb]]



[[File:Band06_chunk002_p016_img008.jpg|thumb]]
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band06 p81 -->
